changeSet.author: restaurant-saas
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, description, created_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'STORE_CREATE', 'Create a new store', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'MENU_READ', 'Read menu items', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'MENU_WRITE', 'Create/Update/Delete menu items', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'ORDER_READ', 'Read orders', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'ORDER_WRITE', 'Create/Update orders', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'SUBSCRIPTION_MANAGE', 'Manage subscriptions', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

changeSet.author: restaurant-saas
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO roles (id, name, store_id, created_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'SUPER_ADMIN', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'STORE_OWNER', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (gen_random_uuid(), 'WAITER', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

changeSet.author: restaurant-saas
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.name = 'SUPER_ADMIN';
INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.name = 'STORE_OWNER' AND p.code IN ('STORE_CREATE', 'MENU_WRITE', 'ORDER_READ');
INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.name = 'WAITER' AND p.code IN ('ORDER_READ', 'ORDER_WRITE');
